name: Torrid Holdings Inc.
business: Torrid Holdings Inc. is a direct-to-consumer brand in North America offering a diverse assortment of stylish apparel, intimates, and accessories for curvy women, specializing in sizes 10 to 30. Products are exclusive to the company and include tops, bottoms, denim, dresses, intimates, activewear, footwear, and accessories. The company operates 483 stores in the U.S., Puerto Rico, and Canada, along with an e-Commerce platform.
sellsTo: employed women aged approximately 30 to 44 years old with above-average annual household income

exposures.sentence: Torrid Holdings Inc. ( Torrid, we, us, our, the Company ) is a direct-to-consumer brand in North America dedicated to offering a diverse assortment of stylish apparel, intimates, and accessories skillfully designed for curvy women.
Our e-Commerce channel is central to our unified commerce platform.
